enrichment.summary: Kyle records a brief daily vlog from his Boulder home on November 20, 2016. He describes his ongoing project of mapping the Roman Empire onto Google Earth, including building roads in Italy and recreating towns. He also mentions his crickets surviving near-freezing temperatures and listening to a new podcast for the first time.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: excited and ambitious about building a full replica including roads, bridges, and towns
newly trying them out, liked the first one he listened to
surprised by how abruptly it shifted from 80 degrees to winter

transcript.text: Hello, living in Boulder vlog for the day of November 20th. Holy shit. Time goes by so fast. It's unbelievable. Um, 2016. Um, because today's number 21st. Um, I'm not working today because I guess it's too cold.

Um, just going to slow them down so I can, I can pick up with the project. Yesterday I was, um, I was just adding a bunch of sister towns, you know, to Boulder, Rome. And, um, and, uh, and then I realized if I was going to get any more detailed, you know, I had to build the roads. Um, but if I was going to build the roads here, I had to build the roads in Italy and I never built the roads in Italy.

And there's a whole bunch of them. So there's seven major ones and like, I don't know, 20 minor ones or whatever. So, um, I'm going to have to go in and build them today. I was doing that towards the end of the day yesterday. It's like 11 now. Um, I was working until late, like two or something. Um, slept a little bit more this day than normal. Uh, but I'm totally trying to stop and ready to go. It's fun to make those roads, but yeah, I want to make the roads and then incorporate everything, you know, maybe like the bridges and stuff.

But, um, and then, and then build as much of a replica here and that, that's going to be really cool. I'm going to build the towns around it. So that's today's project. Um, I'm going to do my videos in my room from now on because, uh, you know, I got a, like a minute and a half in the living room and my roommate comes out and I can't concentrate when my roommate comes out.

Um, and, uh, so yeah. Oh, I said a few days ago that I killed my crickets accidentally, but it turns out they didn't die. They were just hibernated. I was like shaking them around because they spent the night outside and they're all like solid, like they're dead.

But then I came back and they're all running around. So they got only half frozen. Um, so that's good. Um, yeah. And then I got really cold and snowy. It was like 80 degrees and then it was one day and then it was like winter the next. It's crazy.

So, um, what else? Um, yeah, I'm going to try to see if I can, um, power through Google Earth and the Roman Empire. I'll probably go crazy and try to Google Earth the Roman Empire, the entire Roman Empire, meaning I would have to build it on the actual Roman Empire first, which I haven't done.

Um, and then, uh, and then, uh, and then, uh, build it in America. And then I'm, I'm, I'm, I'm, I know I'm going to get, but yeah, I could probably do that this winter. But then after that, I really have to get Libby up there. All the history books up there, uh, on my website. Uh, yeah, but I was just, there's this new podcast, Mike something. He talks about this year. I'm, oh yeah, I'm going to go listen to that.

I got to it yesterday. It was really good. Um, first podcast I've ever listened to. I'm kind of behind the times on technology. So, uh, yeah, I'm a little bit high. I mean, I just had like 10 hits or whatever, but I need to have more. Um, so yeah, I'm going to get going. I'm going to go outside and get going now. All right. Peace out. Wish me luck.
